title: steiropteris alstonii
intro: Steiropteris alstonii, also known as the Alston's tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Dicksoniaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Steiropteris alstonii include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and prevent infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the rhizome of this plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
